By the power of the Sea God,
whose blue blood flows through my veins,
by her mighty flowing bident,
I put a mark upon your name:

For all your lies and stolen secrets
be just an echo, down this well.
For every drop of blood's an ocean,
for you to drown, and bound remain

NE-VER
    TO
      RE-TURN!
